original text:
Posted by jmuma on Mar 29, 2017 in Waterslide Decals, Woodworking Waterslide Decals | 0 comments With the ability to apply waterslide decals to almost any surface the applications are endless.
You can create your own award or plaque to honor a special event or a special person.
Waterslide decal can be applied to wood, metal, plastic, rock, glass and any other ridged surface.
The picture shown above was from a customer of ours who wanted to honor the rowing team he was on.
